headline: Discover the top S&P500 movers in Thursday's after-hours session.
summary: As the regular session of the US market concludes on Thursday, let's get an insight into the after-hours session and identify the top gainers and losers in the S&P500 index.

raw.headline: Discover the top S&P500 movers in Thursday's after-hours session.

headline: Qnity Drops 7.9%. It Was a Bad Day for Semiconductor Stocks.
summary: Semiconductor stocks took it on the chin Thursday.  Instead, investors should look at oil and interest rates.  Shares of semiconductor manufacturing materials company  Qnity Electronics  which was spun out from  DuPont de Nemours  in late 2025, dropped 7.9%.

headline: Qnity Stock Is the Worst in the S&P 500. Here’s Why.
summary: Semiconductor stocks took it on the chin early Thursday.  Instead, investors should look at oil and interest rates.  Shares of semiconductor manufacturing materials company  Qnity Electronics  which was spun out from  DuPont de Nemours  in late 2025, were down 7.4% in midday trading.

headline: Dupont spinoff Qnity expands semiconductor production to Delaware
summary: The 385,000-square-foot facility is part of a multiyear investment to meet rising demand driven by AI, high-performance computing and advanced connectivity.
